description: Recto: letter of introduction for [...] b. Aharon, addressing a community and urging them to show charity to the poor. The text appears to have been erased where the name of the subject appears, and [...] b. Aharon is added in a different hand; possibly the letter was for someone else originally. He is described as [מבני ט[ובים, a common designation for someone deserving of charity or favour. Verso: drawings of eight-pointed stars and other jottings. (Information from CUDL.) Dating: Looks old, perhaps 10th century.
description_he: פנים: מכתב הצגה עבור [...] ב. אהרון, פונה לקהילה ומפציר להראות צדקה לעני. שמו הראשי של הנושא נמחק וגרסה חדשה נוספה בכתב יד אחר. גב: ציורי כוכבים שמונה-קצות ורישומים
